description: Turns support conversations into knowledge. An LLM distils FAQ pairs out of a conversation into faq_candidate records; a reviewer approves, edits or rejects them in the review workbench; approved candidates are written back into a knowledge base with source_type=conversation so the agent recalls them. Management is plain DSL CRUD plus state-transition commands; the knowledge write-back is owned by the platform FaqCandidateCommandHandler (an in-platform Spring bean, not a PF4J jar — the SiteKeyCommandHandler precedent), so this stays a config-only plugin.
author: AuraBoot Team
